title: Support .taskulus dotfile include paths
description: Read .taskulus from cwd or parents up to git root and include listed project/ paths (absolute or relative).
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: .taskulus dotfile support implemented in python/src/taskulus/project.py and rust/src/file_io.rs (find up to git root, include relative/absolute paths, error on missing).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: .taskulus paths are included in discovery; invalid paths error clearly.
